title: 12pcs Shower Curtain Rings,C-Shaped Shower Curtain Hooks for Bathroom,Rust-Proof Shower Hooks for Curtains,Clear Shower Curtain Rings for Easy Glide on Rods
features: 【Durable Material】These Oruola shower curtain rings are crafted from high-quality ABS plastic, ensuring they are lightweight yet sturdy. The rust-proof design of these shower curtain hooks makes them perfect for wet bathroom environments

【Smooth Glide】The C-shaped design of these shower hooks for curtains allows for effortless sliding across the rod, preventing any snagging or sticking. Enjoy a seamless shower experience with these easy-to-use shower curtain hooks plastic

【Easy Installation】Our shower curtain hooks are designed for quick and hassle-free installation. Simply apply a little pressure to attach them to your shower rod, no need for additional tools or accessories

【Versatile Use】These clear shower curtain rings are not only ideal for bathrooms but also suitable for dressing rooms and fitting rooms. Their transparent design complements any decor style, making them a versatile choice for various settings
【Compact Packaging】Each set includes 12pcs of oval-shaped clear shower curtain rings. The compact size of 6 x 4 x 0.5 cm (2.36 x 1.57 x 0.2 in) fits most standard shower curtains and rods
description: Oruola's shower curtain rings, designed to enhance your bathroom experience. Made from durable ABS plastic, these shower curtain hooks are rust-proof and lightweight, ensuring longevity and ease of use. The C-shaped design of these shower hooks for curtains allows for smooth gliding, eliminating any hassle during use. Perfect for bathrooms, dressing rooms, and more, these versatile shower curtain hooks plastic are a must-have.
